narrative: Trump rejection of Iran peace offer intensifies West Asia war fears, driving crude toward $100 and lifting the geopolitical risk premium. USD/JPY firms to 157.12 as the +300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets marginal risk-premium flows; EUR/USD retreats to 1.1765 on the 175bp Fed-ECB spread. Gold lower -0.68% near $4,698; equities +0.84%; DXY +0.17%; VIX 17.2. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27.
